evals.prompt: 帮我找 10 篇劳动经济学最重要的论文，我需要快速了解这个领域的研究脉络
evals.expected_output: 一份包含 10 篇劳动经济学论文的 Markdown 清单，每篇有标题、作者、年份、期刊、DOI、中文摘要和中文入选理由，附带 BibTeX 文件。覆盖劳动经济学的核心分支（如劳动供给、人力资本、工资决定、歧视、移民等）。主动询问是否需要下载 PDF。询问是否需要同时检索中文文献。
expectations: Output contains exactly 10 papers with complete metadata (title, authors, year, journal, DOI)
Each paper has a summary in Chinese (中文)
Each paper has a 1-3 sentence 'Why Irreplaceable' section in Chinese
Output includes a BibTeX file with all 10 papers
Skill proactively asks about PDF download
Skill asks about Chinese literature inclusion (since prompt is in Chinese)
Selection Notes documents branch coverage for labor economics core branches
At least 3 alternative rejected candidates are documented

evals.prompt: I need to understand the literature on digitalization and firm innovation. Find me the 8 most essential papers.
evals.expected_output: A Markdown reading list with 8 papers on digitalization and firm innovation. Since this is not a predefined subfield, the skill should use thematic clustering (e.g., digital technology and productivity, platform economics, data and strategy, AI and labor). All output in English. Proactively offers PDF download.
expectations: Output contains exactly 8 papers with complete metadata
Each paper has an English summary and 1-3 sentence 'Why Irreplaceable'
Output includes a BibTeX file
Skill identifies thematic clusters since 'digitalization and firm innovation' is not in predefined taxonomy
Skill proactively asks about PDF download
No Chinese literature question is asked (prompt is English)
Selection Notes explains the thematic clustering approach
Output language matches prompt language (English)

evals.prompt: 给我找 5 篇关于碳定价的经济学经典论文，要英文的
evals.expected_output: 一份包含 5 篇碳定价相关经济学论文的清单。中文提示词 → 询问是否需要中文文献（用户回复：只要英文的）。论文元数据英文，摘要和入选理由中文（跟随提示词）。询问是否需要下载 PDF。
expectations: Output contains exactly 5 papers on carbon pricing
Each paper has a Chinese summary and Chinese 'Why Irreplaceable'
Paper metadata (title, authors, journal, DOI) is in English
Output includes a BibTeX file
Skill asks about Chinese literature inclusion (prompt is Chinese)
Skill proactively asks about PDF download
Papers cover key aspects of carbon pricing (carbon tax, ETS, social cost of carbon, etc.)
